version_pin_rationale: xdg-desktop-portal-wlr 0.5.0-3 is the jammy universe release. wlroots-family backend for the xdg-desktop-portal framework. Hyprland upstream would use xdg-desktop-portal-hyprland (NOT in jammy — see docs/wayland-de-hyprland.md); the wlr backend covers both sway and Hyprland at the wlroots-protocol level for screenshot/screencast. SHIPPED BUT NOT ENABLED BY DE-H1: same rationale as xdg-desktop-portal — the framework daemon's pipewire dep blocks runtime activation. wlr.portal manifest plants UseIn=wlroots so any sway-or-Hyprland session sees it once the parent daemon runs.
